work_unit: review + merge 1 个待合并 worktree（scout-scan #1 推荐）

outcome_evidence: merge commit cc9870f 'merge: 人工批准合并 optimization worktree opt-gates-1782741280' 落入 onedaybot-dev；`git log --oneline -3` 顶部即该 commit；`git status --short` 空（main 树干净）；`git worktree list` 仅剩 optimization 常设 worktree，opt-gates-1782741280 已不在列（清理成功）；npm test 实测 '# pass 4 # fail 0' 与修正文本逐字吻合。
